videoTitle: KIM KARDASHIAN OPENS UP About Insecurity, Healing Your Pain, & Finding HAPPINESS | Jay Shetty

clips.title: Kim K’s Hidden Face: Who She REALLY Is
clips.description: Jay Shetty explains the Japanese concept of the 'Three Faces' and asks Kim which part of her the world never gets to see.
clips.viral_reason: Gen Z is obsessed with 'authenticity' vs 'curated' personas. This deep psychological dive into Kim's private self is high-retention content.
clips.hook: There's a beautiful statement in Japanese culture that says we have three faces.
clips.caption: The face no one sees... 😶‍🌫️ #KimKardashian #JayShetty #DeepTalks

clips.title: Stop Making Everyone Else Happy
clips.description: Kim discusses the realization that her people-pleasing was draining her, and how focusing on herself actually made others happier.
clips.viral_reason: Matches the 'Main Character Energy' and 'Boundary Setting' trends. It’s a 'hard truth' about self-preservation.
clips.hook: I'm trying to make everyone happy... let me just pull back a second and focus on myself.
clips.caption: Being 'selfish' saved my life 💅 #Boundaries #SelfCare #KimK

clips.title: The Chaos of Being Kim K’s Kids
clips.description: Kim describes the absolute 'madness' of her mornings and how parenting is the hardest thing she’s ever done.
clips.viral_reason: High relatability. Seeing a billionaire struggle with 'toddler madness' humanizes her and generates massive 'same' comments.
clips.hook: Parenting is the thing that has taught me the most about myself.
clips.caption: Billionaires have morning chaos too 🍼🏃‍♀️ #Parenting #Relatable #KimKardashian

clips.title: How Kim Explains the Fame to Her Kids
clips.description: Kim talks about the difficult questions her kids ask and the struggle of keeping them grounded despite the limelight.
clips.viral_reason: Controversial/Affairs category. People are nosy about how the Kardashian kids view their own fame and family drama.
clips.hook: My kids will ask me things... and I have to be really honest.
clips.caption: How do you tell your kids the truth? 🤐 #Kardashians #Fame #ParentingHacks

clips.title: Kim K’s Secret to Success: Zero Self-Hate
clips.description: Kim reveals she isn't hard on herself, she’s just competitive. This is a massive mindset shift for the 'hustle culture' audience.
clips.viral_reason: Polarizing. Most people are self-critical; Kim claiming she isn't will spark debate in the comments about ego vs. confidence.
clips.hook: I've never been hard on myself, but I am competitive with myself.
clips.caption: Stop being your own worst enemy 🚫 #Mindset #SuccessSecret #KimK

clips.title: Kim Kardashian Cries Herself to Sleep
clips.description: A raw moment where Kim admits to feeling like the 'worst mom' and crying herself to sleep during the hard times.
clips.viral_reason: Vulnerability is the ultimate viral currency. Seeing the 'unshakable' Kim K admit to breaking down is a 10/10 spice level for emotional impact.
clips.hook: There are nights I cry myself to sleep... like, what just happened?
clips.caption: The side of Kim we never see 🥺💔 #Vulnerability #MentalHealth #MomGuilt

clips.title: What Kris Jenner REALLY Thinks of Kim
clips.description: Jay shares a story from Kris Jenner about how Kim is the 'fixer' for the entire family, no matter how busy she is.
clips.viral_reason: Family dynamics/Beef category. People love hearing 'behind the scenes' info about the family hierarchy and who actually runs the show.
clips.hook: When I was speaking to your mom, she was saying that about you...
clips.caption: The REAL 'fixer' of the family 💼🕵️‍♀️ #Kardashians #KrisJenner #FamilySecrets

clips.title: Why Everyone Deserves a Second Chance
clips.description: Kim discusses her work with prison reform and why mistakes shouldn't define a person's entire life.
clips.viral_reason: Controversial/Hard Truths. This touches on her law career and social justice, which always sparks heated political debate in comments.
clips.hook: We all make mistakes... the second chance we get makes a huge difference.
clips.caption: One mistake shouldn't ruin your life 🏛️⚖️ #Justice #SecondChances #KimKardashian
